{{Quote|…that the Senate has voted to send a peace-keeping force to the planet Onderon. This quick-strike force will reinforce a band of Jedi Knights already on the planet. Onderon was once under the rule of Freedon Nadd, a follower of the outlawed Sith. Practitioners of forbidden Sith magic are said to be still active on Iziz, Onderon's single great city. Rumors suggest that the spirit of the long dead Sith Lord Freedon Nadd continues to control the city. On the economic front…|A Holonet newsanchor in 3998 BBY|audio=HNN-TotJ.flac|<ref name="TOTJA">[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
The '''Freedon Nadd Uprising''', also called the '''Naddist Revolt''' or the '''Naddist Uprising''', was a series of battles fought during the [[Old Sith Wars]], that occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] in [[3998 BBY]]. The Uprising began when, in an attempt to cleanse Onderon of the dark side, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] confiscated the remains of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Freedon Nadd]] from Onderon's Queen [[Amanoa]].

During the funeral for Queen Amanoa of Onderon, the Jedi-led procession was interrupted when the Naddists temporarily gained the upper hand by, not only capturing the remains of Freedon Nadd and Amanoa, but also capturing [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]] when they seized control of the city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. Eventually the Jedi and a fleet of Republic ships were sent to the planet to end the uprising and free Jedi Master Arca Jeth.

==History==
===Background===
Several centuries prior to the conclusion of the [[Beast Wars]], [[Freedon Nadd]], the fallen Jedi turned Sith Lord, had used his knowledge of Sith magic to install himself as leader of the planet [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. Based out of the city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], Nadd's reign was marked by his iron fist and his institution of martial law to help bring the world under his control. During this time, Nadd made the decision that all criminals were to be banished outside the walls of the city where they would be hunted and killed by the predators that roamed free there.

However, contrary to Nadd's planning, some of them managed to survive and learned to domesticate the predators, eventually building a large force which they then used to attack Nadd and his followers, thus starting an enormous [[Beast Wars|war]] which engulfed the whole of Onderon. The Beast Wars soon grew out of the control of Freedon Nadd, who was ultimately unable to stop them, thus allowing them to continue well after his death—the war would not end until [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" />

Following the events surrounding his death, Freedon Nadd's remains were buried on Onderon beneath the royal palace in Iziz, eventually becoming a focal point of dark side energy to be used and exploited by his descendant's. Approximately six hundred years later, near the end of the Beast Wars, the two brothers [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic]] and [[Cay Qel-Droma]], both Jedi students of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]], discovered that the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of Onderon, a woman named [[Amanoa]], was the descendant of Freedon Nadd and had been using his dark influences to further her own lust for power.

Eventually, several Jedi, led by Master Jeth, followed Amanoa to the secret location of Freedon Nadd's tomb, where the dark side sorceress was attempting to call up Nadd's spirit for help. Realizing that Amanoa could no longer serve his purposes, Nadd pulled his dark side support from Amanoa, and thus causing her to die. The Beast Wars had effectively come to an end.<ref name="EGTTF">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

Following the end of the Beast Wars in [[3998 BBY]], Master Jeth and his Jedi students attempted to move the sarcophagus containing the remains of Freedon Nadd and Queen Amanoa from the capital city Iziz to deprive anyone from any further corruption.<ref name="NEC" />

===The uprising===
[[File:Naddist_soldiers.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Naddist soldiers on Onderon 3998 BBY]]

The [[Naddist]] [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]], attempted to overthrow the pro-[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] government of Queen [[Galia]], and her husband, King [[Oron Kira]] during the funeral procession.<ref name="NEC" /> Several hundred Naddists, led by [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolyte]] [[Warb Null]] used an underground war machine to [[Funeral of Amanoa|attack]] the procession. During the battle, the Naddists were able to capture the remains of Freedon Nadd and Queen Amanoa. When they had what they came for they retreated to the sub levels of the city.<ref name="FNU">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]''</ref>

Master Jeth, Ulic Qel-Droma and Queen Galia then searched the sub levels for King [[Ommin/Legends|Ommin]], who was rumored to live there, in search for a way to remove the darkness from the planet. When they found Ommin, Freedon Nadd's [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] appeared and the King revealed that he was the leader of the Naddists.<ref name="TOTJA" /> While Qel-Droma fought Warb Null, King Ommin was able to capture Master Jeth and escape. The Jedi and [[Beast Riders]] were forced to leave Iziz, they retreated to [[Kira Fortress|Fortress Kira]].<ref name="FNU" /><ref name="FF115">[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 115|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 115]]</ref><ref name="FF113">[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 113|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 113]]</ref>

[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Ulic Qel-Droma was forced to call for assistance,<ref name="NEC" /> meanwhile King Ommin attempted to turn Master Jeth to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]].<ref name="FF115" /> After receiving Qel-Droma's message, the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate's]] Defense Committee engaged in a heated debate about sending the Republic fleet to Onderon or not. Some of the senators felt that fighting the dark side was a matter for the Jedi, not the Republic. The [[Tchuukthai]] Jedi Master [[Thon]] managed to convince the senators to come to the Jedi's aid and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] battlecruisers and troop transports converged on Onderon, together with a team of handpicked Jedi Knights from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].<ref name="TOTJA" />

[[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] attacked the Naddists in Iziz while the Jedi Knights [[Dace Diath]], [[Qrrrl Toq]], [[Shoaneb Culu]], [[Kith Kark]], and [[Nomi Sunrider]], who used her [[Battle meditation/Legends|Battle meditation]] against the Naddists, assisted in the defense of Fortress Kira and drove back the Naddists. Kith Kark was killed during the battle, and Nomi was knocked from her feet by the Dark Side, but was unharmed. The Jedi then returned to Iziz to rescue Master Jeth, when they entered Ommin's lair they destroyed several [[Sith Elite Warbot|Sith war droids]]. Cay Qel-Droma lost his droid arm while his brother and Sunrider attacked Ommin, who proved to be a formidable opponent. But the Jedi eventually triumphed when Qel-Droma destroyed [[Ommin's mechanical exoskeleton]] and the King fell to the ground like an [[Arkanian jellyfish]]. Ommin asked Freedon Nadd's spirit for assistance, but the Sith Lord abandoned the King.<ref name="FNU" />

The arrival of Republic and Jedi reinforcements from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] marked a turning of the tide, and the rebellion ended with the death of Ommin at the hands of Ulic Qel Droma. The transfer of corpses was carried out without further incident.<ref name="NEC" />

==Aftermath==
Although the Naddists were put down, during the revolt two members of the [[Keto family/Legends|Keto family]], [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto|Aleema]], arrived on Onderon and gained valuable [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] knowledge, texts and artifacts from Nadd's spirit and Ommin. They would use those materials in the establishment of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] cult.<ref name="NEC" />
